summary: Maeda has shifted from a bearish stance to calling a market bottom, explicitly stating that Bitcoin is poised for higher prices.
narrative: His latest analysis argues that the crypto markets are bottoming, citing STRC as a potential catalyst to propel BTC upward while challenging the conventional four-year cycle theory. This marks a significant reversal from his late 2025 strategy of shorting Ethereum, indicating he believes the corrective phase has concluded.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
